title.en: Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Xia...

content.en:
After Ye Tianxiu broke through to the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm, he gave a large amount of Eternal Essence Gold Liquid to his family.

In just hundreds of thousands of years of the Dao Era, the cultivation of his son Ye Xingchen broke through to the middle stage of the Mythical Dao Realm.

And the cultivation of his wife Xiao Yue and daughter Ye Xingyue was directly promoted to the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm, after all, they did not take the path of the strongest to the Dao, and it was more tolerant to improve their cultivation.

And the Legends of the Terrans to the Dao Realm have enough Qiong Jelly Golden Feather Liquid, so those Terran Legends to the Dao Realm can easily raise their cultivation to the peak of the Legendary Dao Realm, and the only problem is to comprehend the rules of the Dao Realm.

After all, for them, the rules of enlightenment can only be realized slowly, and the efficiency is relatively slow.

......

this day.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Xiao Yue to discuss a matter.

"I'm going to let go of the Miluo Domain!" Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen was taken aback: "Father, the Miluo Domain is too precious, if you really want to let go, the news will definitely not be hidden, and the other elders will also know, and they will definitely put pressure on my father when the time comes!"

"Your father and I have skyrocketed in strength, and we have enough strength to protect ourselves. Of course, at present, it will not be all released, only the top elites of the human race will be allowed to come in and comprehend, and make an oath that it will not be allowed to be leaked, and it will not be leaked out in a short time!" Ye Tian said.

"That's fine!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen went to select the top elite of the human race, that is, the level of the legendary Dao realm, and must be loyal to the human race and have a good character, so that he can enjoy the treatment of the first batch to enter the Miluo domain.

Soon.

Ye Xingchen selected more than thirty Legends to the Dao Realm and prepared to let them enter the Miluo Domain.

After this batch of legends entered the Miluo Domain in the Dao Realm, Ye Xingchen came forward and explained the mystery here.

Suddenly, all the legends to the Dao realm were excited.

"You must make an oath not to leak here, otherwise there will be some trouble when the news spreads out of the human domain!" Ye Xingchen said.

These people of the human race legend to the Dao realm naturally immediately made a supreme dao oath, after all, they would not think of divulging it, this oath had no effect on them.

After making the vow, these terrans said that they would be able to cultivate and comprehend the Supreme Dao rules here in the future, and they also thought that they could exchange high-quality and above the Supreme Dao rules items, so that they could comprehend the Supreme Dao rules faster.

Of course.

Even Ye Tian didn't take out too many Supreme Dao Rule items for them to exchange, because high-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao Rule items, third-order Supreme Dao Rule items, and second-order Supreme Dao Rule items were really rare.

If Ye Tian went to look for it now, he could find it, but he was too lazy to look for it.

After all, he didn't expect this group of Terrans to help him, he just hoped that this group of Terrans could develop the Terrans better.

So, just go with the flow, help occasionally, but if you help like he helped his own family, it definitely won't work.

......

After the Miluo Domain was half announced, the Supreme Dao rules of the Terran Legend Dao Realm progressed relatively quickly.

And Ye Tian was also making every effort to improve his supreme mythical body, and after hundreds of thousands of Dao eras, his dragon scale mythical body took the lead in completing the fourth transformation.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's physical strength skyrocketed.

In the years that followed, the other Supreme Mythical Bodies also completed their transformations one by one, until the eighteen Supreme Mythical Bodies completed their fourth transformation.

At this time, his strength had skyrocketed.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian also fused the second Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, and then used this Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, and after depleting this Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, his Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule reached the five-point realm.

"It's a pity that the Miro statue is not very helpful to the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao, otherwise you can quickly comprehend!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the blink of an eye, another million solstice era years have passed.

Ye Tian's strength has not improved much compared to the past, he wants to raise the Supreme Mythical Body to the fifth transformation, it is estimated that he will not be able to do it without five million Dao Era years, the premise is that he has to consume countless resources.

"Taking the path of the strongest to the path is really too resource-consuming, and it is not cost-effective, this is still the legendary blood treasure that I have. If there is no Legendary Blood Treasure, it is almost impossible to complete the transformation of so many supreme mythical bodies many times!" Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

The Abyss of Eternal Darkness.

A group of Abyssal Dao creatures tried to rush out, and Ye Tian easily killed them.

For him now, it was simply too easy to kill these abyssal creatures.

Hall of the Senate.

The first elder and Ye Tian were chatting.

"Ye Tian, now that you are guarding the Eternal Dark Abyss, there is no problem, right?"

"There's no problem!" Ye Tian said: "There are only occasional abyssal supreme creatures who try to come out, relying on the formation, it is not difficult to block them." "

"That's good!"

The First Elder nodded slightly.

The two chatted and discussed, and discussed an important matter.

"According to my information, the First Demon Venerable is in retreat and cultivating, and he took away all the Gu Yuan Fruit fragments collected by the Demon Venerables, and used those Gu Yuan Fruit Fragments plus countless precious treasures to try to take half a step out of that step. Although it is not a real breakthrough, if he improves a little bit, his strength may skyrocket. At that time, even I can't stop the First Demon Venerable. "The First Elder Dao.

"First Elder, what are you going to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

The First Patriarch pondered for a moment before he said, "I hope you can go to a place and help me get something!"

"Where?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Mythical Valley!" the First Elder said: "Mythical Valley is a very special place, it is very dangerous inside, although I am sure to get that thing, but the First Demon Venerable has been staring at me, if I enter the Mythical Valley, I will not be able to get out in a short time." Once I can't get out, the First Demon Venerable will inevitably invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance as soon as possible and destroy the Innate Origin Domain Alliance. Then set up a large array at the entrance of the Mythical Valley to block me. So, I can't enter the Valley of Myths. "

"First Elder, what did you ask me to go to the Valley of Mythology to get something?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Mythical Golden Grass!" The First Patriarch said: "This resource will help me break through in half a step, but it is relatively difficult to obtain, and it is easy to fall, other Patriarchs are definitely unwilling to enter, but now that you have cultivated to break through, the Mythical Body has also broken through, I estimate that you already have the strength of the top ten patriarchs." Moreover, even if your doppelganger falls, the price of refining it shouldn't be too great. If you take out the Mythical Golden Grass, I will not treat you badly. "

Ye Tian thought about it carefully and agreed.
